data.title: OAuth 2.0 Authentication
data.description: Secure user authentication and authorization using OAuth 2.0 protocol.
data.technical_spec: Token-based access control with scopes for resource access.

data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures data privacy and security during transmission with TLS encryption.
data.technical_spec: Supports HTTPS with TLS 1.2 and 1.3 protocols.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protection measures in place to defend against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic filtering and rate limiting strategies.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify and rectify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party cybersecurity firms for comprehensive assessments.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizes ethical hacking to discover and report security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Provides monetary rewards for reported vulnerabilities.
